name: Gazpacho 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the vegetables (zucchini, green pepper, onion) and mince the garlic.
2. Add the chopped vegetables and spices to a blender or food processor and blend for 10 seconds.
3. Pour the mixture into a bowl and stir in the juice.
4. Refrigerate until chilled before serving.
